title: Deleter
description: This mod adds an option to permanently delete all of your junk.
body:
## Deleter:

- Add new ore "Delitium"
- Add new block "Deleter"

## Craft deleter:

![Deleter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8911c360a2d6bd8fd41cc7e7cbe97fb1b6f9aba0.png)

## Block deleter:

![Deleter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45d287a0f79fcd13f7c4181250e3588ff32bd309.png)

### This mod can help clean up your stuff and not litter the world with them
